inlayHintPatterns.label: padding: ${1 * 0.25}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed padding value in rem for spacing utilities. E.g. p-4 → padding: 1rem (16px).

inlayHintPatterns.label: margin: ${1 * 0.25}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed margin value in rem. E.g. m-4 → margin: 1rem (16px).

inlayHintPatterns.label: gap: ${1 * 0.25}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed gap value. E.g. gap-4 → gap: 1rem (16px).

inlayHintPatterns.label: width: ${1 * 0.25}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed width value for numeric width utilities.

inlayHintPatterns.label: height: ${1 * 0.25}rem
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed height value for numeric height utilities.

inlayHintPatterns.label: → #{color_hex}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the hex color value for Tailwind palette colors. E.g. bg-blue-500 → #3b82f6.

inlayHintPatterns.label: → #{color_hex}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the hex color value for text color utilities.

inlayHintPatterns.label: → #{color_hex}
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the hex color value for border color utilities.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ≥640px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the min-width breakpoint value for sm: prefix.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ≥768px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the min-width breakpoint value for md: prefix.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ≥1024px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the min-width breakpoint value for lg: prefix.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ≥1280px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the min-width breakpoint value for xl: prefix.

inlayHintPatterns.label: ≥1536px
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the min-width breakpoint value for 2xl: prefix.

inlayHintPatterns.label: → font-size
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed font-size. E.g. text-lg → 1.125rem / 18px.

inlayHintPatterns.label: → border-radius
inlayHintPatterns.description: Shows the computed border-radius value. E.g. rounded-lg → 0.5rem / 8px.
